title: ctenitis villosa
intro: Ctenitis villosa, also known as the hairy fern or the velvety ctenitis, is a species of fern native to Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis villosa include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Ctenitis villosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
